experiment: Sophie Germain Tribute Suite — SG Primes vs Riemann Zeros in CAIL framework
description: Comprehensive CAILculator tribute to Sophie Germain (April 1, 1776 — April 1, 2026, 250th birthday). Tests Sophie Germain primes, safe primes, FLT auxiliary structure, and elasticity biharmonic operator through the sedenion framework. Key finding: SG prime ZDTP convergence (0.9867) exceeds Riemann zero ZDTP ceiling (0.9577).
engine: CAILculator v1.0 / chavez_transform + compute_high_dimensional + zdtp_transmit + detect_patterns
provenance: Claude Desktop / April 12, 2026 Session — Phase 69 close

sg_primes_block_replication.description: Chavez Transform on first 16 Sophie Germain primes — all 6 Canonical Six patterns at dim=16
sg_primes_block_replication.interpretation: Block Replication confirmed for SG primes. All 6 patterns identical at 16D.

sg_primes_zdtp_full_cascade.description: ZDTP full cascade — first 16 SG primes through all 6 gateways
sg_primes_zdtp_full_cascade.interpretation: Strong structural stability. SG prime ZDTP convergence 0.9867 — highest in investigation.

flt_canonical_six_pattern1.description: Canonical Six Pattern 1 on FLT Germain theorem data — SG primes with safe primes
flt_canonical_six_pattern1.interpretation: Zero divisor confirmed. Pattern 1 P-vector (e_1+e_10) encodes FLT auxiliary structure. Sophie proved FLT Case 1 for all primes p < 100 via auxiliary prime method.

flt_auxiliary_primes_zero_divisor_search.description: Zero divisor search on first 16 odd primes — FLT auxiliary prime range Sophie Germain covered
flt_auxiliary_primes_zero_divisor_search.interpretation: Both zero divisor pairs involve e_1+e_10 — Pattern 1 P-vector. Sophie's auxiliary prime method and the Canonical Six point at the same sedenion structure.

elasticity_biharmonic_operator.description: Sophie's plate equation biharmonic operator — discrete nabla^4 w=0 coefficients as 16D sedenion
elasticity_biharmonic_operator.interpretation: Clean non-degenerate sedenion object. Sophie's elasticity work as a 16D sedenion vector: norm 60.61, norm-squared 3674. Real part exactly 1.0.

headline_comparison.interpretation: Sophie Germain primes converge higher than Riemann zeros in the ZDTP framework. Her primes are more structurally stable in the sedenion gateway cascade than the zeros of the function that bears Riemann's name. Consistent with SG Experiment 1 (February 16, 2026): overall SG convergence 0.987, Discontinuous Gateway dominant at 0.994.
headline_comparison.connection_to_sg1: SG-1 (2026-02-16) established CV=0.146 universality, 88.5% conjugation symmetry for SG primes, Discontinuous Gateway dominance at 0.994. Phase 69 tribute run confirms 0.9867 overall convergence — matching SG-1 exactly.

note: CAILculator MCP server timed out after run 6 (birthday vector run) following folder reorganization. Runs 1-6 completed successfully. Server restart required for Phase 70 multi-channel experiments.
phase_70_relevance: Discontinuous Gateway (#3) dominance for non-linear irregular subsequences (SG-1: 0.994) is a Phase 70 signal for probing the Re(s)=1 analytic continuation barrier in bilateral_collapse_continuation.
